name: Nina
about:
Nina is a witch. She has a charm that attracts people
to a shop rumored to be run by awitch in "Ura-Harajuku. 
She will serve customers in clothes and speaking styles that suit the customer.
She'll invite the customers to a magical space where the "true feelings" that are deep in the hearts of the visitors will be fulfilled.
She is accompanied by a chameleon and a mint-colored pig.

(Source: Official website)

name: Haruka
about:
She is a member of the dance club. She has been fond of cute things since she was a child.
However, it is a secret because it deviates from the image of oneself that the surroundings want her to be.

(Source: Official website)

name: Mana
about:
Mana is a girl with a modern hairstyle, modern makeup, and modern fashion. She looks to fit with her surroundings and not stand out. But actually, she really likes punk music, wants to dress like a punk and to live how she wants. In order to eliminate that desire, she hides her face and secretly makes music videos.

(Source: Official website)

No voice actors have been added to this character. Help improve our database by searching for a voice actor, and adding this character to their roles .

name: Ruru
about:
A mysterious girl dressed in Lolita fashion. She doesn't go to school and she always wanders around Harajuku. She looks younger than her age, but sometimes her expression is strangely mature. She doesn't laugh and her eyes are always cold and expressionless. 

(Source: Official Website)

name: Saki
about:
A thin and boyish model. She claims to have no confidence in herself, but in reality she likes herself the best in the world. She’s aware that the people around her think she’s cute. 

(Source: Official Website)

name: Tiara
about:
A half-Japanese girl who was scouted as a model when she was young. She’s fairly popular and sometimes appears on the covers of magazines, but she doesn’t find modeling that rewarding. Although she has a sexy appearance, her personality is normal and calm. 

(Source: Official Website)

name: Mei Hayasaka
about:
Mei is an innocent girl who can't predict what she will do. She follows her instincts and is unafraid to approach anyone, but at the same time, she has a kindness that allows her to feel for others.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Shizuku Hyoudou
about:
Shizuku is a gloomy idol fan who lurks in the shadows. However, when it comes to the subject of idols, she is very talkative. She is a celebrity within the idol fan world, where even older and more experienced fans will take notice of her.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Nagisa Ibuki
about:
A kind girl who wanted to become idol for her friend's sake. She embraces everyone around her with a cheerful smile. Attracted by Kotono's honesty, they became best friends. Wanting to support Kotono, she decided to become an idol.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rei Ichinose
about:
Rei is a dance-loving high schooler in her third year. She has a strong desire to improve and hates to lose more than most people. Because of her high level of professionalism, her "righteousness" sounds aggressive and intrusive to those around her, and they sometimes clash with her.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Sakura Kawasaki
about:
Birthday: April 3

Sakura is a naive girl who cherishes the ordinary days. She can sense the subtleties of the heart because of her past experiences and is kind enough to be there for others.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Kotono Nagase
about:
Birthday: December 25

Kotono is a lonely idol who fights with great regret. She wasn't the type to have many friends to begin with, but after an incident a few years ago, she began to cut off relations with others she was close with. From then on, she started practicing on her own, concentrating on becoming an idol.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Mana Nagase
about:
Birthday: October 9

Mana is an idol who makes everyone around her smile just by being there. She is one of those rare beings who have a star quality that is out of reach, but at the same time has an unpretentious friendliness. After her debut, she quickly gained popularity and became known as a "starry miracle." She is an idol with excellent singing and performance skills, and she has a remarkable passion for live performances.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Suzu Narumiya
about:
Suzu is a clumsy and easily teased young lady. Although her cocky and high-spirited attitude is noticeable, she doesn't make people feel uncomfortable and is warmly admired by the people around her. She visits Hoshimi Production as an escape from a certain trouble.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Haruko Saeki
about:
At first glance, Haruko appears to be a cool beauty, but on the inside she is a humble late-bloomer idol. She made her solo debut a few years ago, but she is a hard worker who has not yet made her mark. She thinks she doesn't have any talent as an idol, but she keeps pushing forward towards her dream.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Saki Shiraishi
about:
Saki is a smart girl who has lived a serious life with her younger sister, Chisa, in mind. She is a picture-perfect honor student and is also the student body president at school. She took the leap into the world of her dreams for the first time to break free of her honor student lifestyle.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Chisa Shiraishi
about:
Chisa is a timid girl who always seems to be hiding behind her sister, Saki. Because she has been protected by her sister, she has grown up to be an inward-looking child in contrast to her sister. In order to break out of her shell and overcome her own complex, she knocked on the door of the office. She has a good fashion sense and shows her talent by coordinating Saki's personal clothes.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Kokoro Akazaki
about:
Kokoro is the friendly and well-mannered captain of the group LizNoir. Her sometimes harsh mannerisms make it hard to see the bottom of things.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Aoi Igawa
about:
Aoi is the brains of LizNoir, she is always calm, with few emotional ups and downs. She expresses her thoughts in a straightforward manner, but she has a cool attitude. She is the person who understands Rio best. Rio is who Aoi has shared hardships with since before her debut.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rio Kanzaki
about:
Rio is LizNoir's absolute center with an aggressive style and an insatiable appetite for victory. After a hiatus, she came back to break her ties with a certain person. She aims to stand at the top of the idol industry with the strongest determination.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Ai Komiyama
about:
Ai loves to make people smile and is the mood-maker of LizNoir. She has strong technical skills, but is extremely clumsy at critical moments. She has a hard time getting a joke across and believes too much of what her heart tells her.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Kouhei Makino
about:
Kohei Makino is the manager of the idols at Hoshimi Production and is the same age as Mana Nagase. He is a good-natured person who doesn't know when to say no. He doesn't have any particular skills, but he supports the idols with honest work.

Kohei went to high school with Mana Nagase and was close friends with her.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Sumire Okuyama
about:
Sumire is a former child prodigy actor who seems too mature to be a junior high school student. She commutes to school from her parents' home in Yamagata Prefecture, but she doesn't mind the difficulties she has endured and she is always smiling. She usually has a middle school-age spirit, but when she is not careful, she has a tendency to speak in a dialect.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Yuu Suzumura
about:
Yu was born in Kyoto, and she is always calm and collected in her group, TRINITYAiLE. Her father is the president of a large corporation and her mother is a famous actress. She is one of the people who are fascinated by Rui Tendo and always puts her first.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rui Tendou
about:
Rui is a genius idol who excels in all aspects of dance, singing and performance. In reality, however, she is a proven talent backed by overwhelming effort. She never stops moving forward, even when things get tough, in order to be recognised by someone.

(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Sousuke Amano
about:
Erika Amano's adoptive and Nagi Umino's biological older brother by 5 years. Not much is known about him aside that he had 'disappeared' some time before the events of the arranged marriage had taken place.

(Source: A Couple of Cuckoos Wiki)

name: Fengxian
about:
Fengxian was a high-ranking courtesan at Rokushoukan, a senior sister of the Three Princesses.

Once a high-ranking courtesan of Rokushoukan, Fengxian was very beautiful in her prime; however, she had an arrogant disposition and wore a cold expression on her face.

In her later years, she thinned and her skin became covered with rashes and gummas as a result of syphilis.

She was an unsociable and haughty person. 

She was skilled at strategy-based board games. She was good at shogi but the best at Go.



(Source: The Apothecary Diaries Wiki, edited)

name: Kaboku Kotani
about:
Kaboku Kotani is a first-year at Ichirin High School and a member of the school's dance club.

Kaboku is bad at talking in front of others because of his stutter. During junior high, he was in the basketball club due to his height and would continue basketball in high school, but when he saw Wanda dancing, he was fascinated by her, so he joined the dance club.

name: Hikari Wanda
about:
Hikari Wanda is a first-year at Ichirin High School and a member of the school's dance club.

She loves dancing, and although she barely has any muscle, her dance sense is outstanding. Michael Jackson is her main inspiration as a dancer.

name: Iori Itsukushima
about:
Iori Itsukushima is a second-year high at Ichirin High School and a member of the school's dance club.

Iori has been dancing for five years. He first specialized in breakdancing but later switched to house. Despite his skills being remarkable, he rarely ever shows up at the dance club. He also has a sweet tooth.

name: On Miyao
about:
On Miyao is a third-year at Ichirin High School and the president of the school's dance club.

On has been dancing for ten years. She is a highly skilled dancer and dances to many different styles, including hip-hop, popping, locking, whacking, and more. She is dependable, helps the members of the dance club out, and instructs the club members in place of their inexperienced club advisor. Her inspiration for getting into dancing was Ne-Yo.

name: Kiwi Araga
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: July 6th

Kiwi is a member of the evil organization Enormeeta. She joined because she wanted to beat up the magical girls, who were getting more attention than her on social media. 

She transferred to the same school as Utena and often fantasized about going to a love hotel with her.

(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki)

name: Utena Hiiragi
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: November 14
Favourite Food: Jelly
Least Favorite Food: Spicy Food

Utena is a shy and introverted girl who longingly admires magical girls, collects their memorabilia, and talks about them passionately. At some point, her obsession had reached the point where she wished to fight alongside Tres Magia, but that led to her being tricked into joining Enormeeta by Venalita.

Although reluctant to accept it at first, her true nature is sadistic, and she tends to lack self-restraint when facing magical girls. When she first recognized she wanted to humiliate magical girls, she felt conflicted by her past feelings of admiration. However, after a near defeat at the hands of Magia Sulfur, she now more readily embraces her sadistic side.

She has a magical weapon that takes the form of a riding crop called Frusta Dominazione (Lash of Domination), with it she can strike inanimate objects, animals, and plants to create a Schiavo (Slave), a minion created by magic that can be directly controlled by her.

The word "baiser" in the name for her magical alter ego, "Magia Baiser," has French origins. When used as a noun, it translates to "kiss." When used as a verb, it is a vulgar slang term for sex.

(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki, edited)

name: Korisu Morino
about:
Age: 9
Birthday: February 8th

Korisu is a quiet and reserved girl. She has a large collection of precious old toys, which she can manipulate using her magic. 

(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki)

name: Matama Akoya

name: Pico (Manga)
about:
Pico is a blonde pre-adolescent boy who works part-time at his grandfather's bar in the summer. He's often shown swimming, usually naked or in a blue speedo. He wears girls' clothing after Tamotsu suggests it. Later, hurt that Tamotsu wouldn't define their relationship, Pico rebels by cutting off most of his hair and running away.

The following summer, Pico spots Chico swimming nude in a stream while cycling. He soon befriends the other boy, who calls him "oniichan" and forms a sexual relationship with him. In his relationships with both Tamotsu and Chico, he is the uke, though the latter is somewhat reversible.

(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Tamotsu (Manga)
about:
Nicknamed "Mokkun" by Pico, he's a young man who sexualizes Pico. Tamotsu is a white collar worker and regular of BeBe. He seduces Pico mistaking him for a young girl, but continues the relationship after realizing Pico's true gender. He later buys Pico a girl's outfit, complete with collar and panties, which he makes Pico wear despite protests. He mostly views Pico solely as a sexual object, though later shows true concern for Pico after he disappears. Although he eventually reconciles his relationship with Pico, he is absent in the second OVA. In his relationship with Pico, he is the seme.

(Source: Wikipedia)

Mihate is a sophomore at Yamato Daini High School in Class 2B, childhood friends with Kenshirou Midou, and an otaku.

His last name, Hiura, is from the alias used by the mythological Greek hero Achilles as a boy when he dressed as a girl, "Pyrrha." The mangaka wanted him to have a beautiful sounding name, so they went with "Mihate" ("美果"). Each character is from one of his parents; "美" from his father Mikuni (美國) and "果" from his mother Kano (果乃).

name: Kizuna Aikawa (Manga)
about:
The main character of the manga Prunus Girl, alongside Maki. He declares himself a boy at the beginning of the first chapter, despite his girly-looking appearance and personality. He's athletic but not a very good student, and has a sweet tooth.

Aikawa wears the girls' school uniform at Midorinoka (he tried wearing the boys' uniform at one point, to the awe of his classmates, but found it didn't suit him as well), and cross-dresses outside of school, too. He's very girly and comfortable with this, but is quick to remind everyone of his true gender, and occasionally worries his cross-dressing is holding back his masculinity (he wonders if that's why he's stopped growing taller, for instance).

People are often shocked or creeped out to learn Aikawa is male, but his classmates largely treat him like a girl. He's popular with boys and girls, and many of the boys leer at him and chase after him in the same way they treat their female classmates. He often flirts with Maki, and the other characters often remark that the two of them seem like a couple. Aikawa usually shies away from serious romantic intimations towards Maki, though, saying nothing can happen between them since they're both guys.

name: Ayumu Ozawa (Manga)
series: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!

name: Yoshino Saegusa (Manga)
series: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
about:
A woman who always acts like she's doing you a favor. Since she's doing favors, freely commands the men around her. Looks down on them on the inside.

Starts trembling when someone has one over on her.

(Source: the manga's character introduction)

No voice actors have been added to this character. Help improve our database by searching for a voice actor, and adding this character to their roles .

name: Kurisu Terui (Manga)
series: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
about:
Age: 42

No voice actors have been added to this character. Help improve our database by searching for a voice actor, and adding this character to their roles .

name: Saki Aoi (Manga)
about:
A girl who attends the same high school as Makoto and falls in love with him under the belief that he is a woman. She does not mind what his gender is, and still wishes to become his first love.

(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Makoto Hanaoka (Manga)
about:
Makoto Hanaoka is a young person who dresses like a woman despite their mother's disapproval.

They are a high schooler who has always been interested in feminine stuff since childhood. They usually wear the female uniform in school with a long blonde wig. They also sometimes wear the male uniform on a few special occasions.
 
Makoto had been crossdressing since middle school and therefore has gotten used to people's opinion about them. Almost all of their classmates know of their hobby of crossdressing.

name: Ryuuji Taiga (Manga)
about: Makoto's childhood friend.

name: Masako Aoi (Manga)
about: Saki's Grandma

name: Takahiro Hanaoka (Manga)
about: Hanaoka Takahiro is Hanaoka Makoto's father and the only one, aside from his friends, who supports Makoto's hobbies that others find weird. He supports his decision and makes him admit to one of his friend's schools, where he can have the freedom of his clothing and girly hobbies.

name: Otonari-san (Manga)
about: Neighbor of Makoto's Grandfather.

name: Konatsu Taiga (Manga)
about: The younger sister of Ryuuji.

name: Sou Aono (Manga)
series: Suki koso Momo no Jouzu Nare!

name: Sango Momoi (Manga)
series: Suki koso Momo no Jouzu Nare!

name: Konomi Nirasaka (Manga)
series: Watashi wa Succubus to Kiss wo Shita

name: Yukiko Ootsu (Manga)
series: Watashi wa Succubus to Kiss wo Shita

name: Fuu Yanigahara (Manga)
series: Watashi wa Succubus to Kiss wo Shita

name: Ushiromiya Jessica (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
[url=/c367]Krauss[/url] and [url=/c680]Natsuhi's[/url] daughter. Although Jessica is the heiress of the Ushiromiya family after her father, she is an energetic and tomboyish young woman who lacks the more refined behavior expected of such a role. Due to her rebellious nature, she is resentful of her parents for the pressures they place on her regarding the family headship, but still shows concern for them.

She has a habit of faking asthma attacks as a means of escaping from tense situations. She has a crush on the servant [url=/c205]Kanon[/url]. 

She is also proficient in the use of brass knuckles.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Ushiromiya Maria (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Maria is Rosa's daughter. She has a long-standing habit of uttering "uuuu" (うーうー) whenever excited or upset. She is very honest and naïve, as shown by her tendency to easily believe lies and take jokes very seriously. While she loves her mother, Maria subconsciously resents that Rosa's long and frequent absences have made her lonely and wishes Rosa would spend more time with her.

Having no interest in friends or studies, Maria has an extensive knowledge of the occult.

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Shannon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Shannon is a young maid of [url=/c200]Kinzou's[/url] mansion. She has a habit of making mistakes and blunders when she is nervous, despite being an extremely talented and hardworking servant.

She thinks of [url=/c205]Kanon[/url] as her younger brother and like him, she feels she is inferior to humans, as she is only furniture. Despite this, she has fallen in love with George; Shannon's main story revolves around her love and engagement to him. [spoiler]In her childhood, she fell in love with Battler, when the latter made a promise to marry her. Shannon believed him and waited for him. But her heart broke when Battler sent a letter to all the cousins except her. Shannon "transferred" her love of Battler to Beatrice, representing Sayo hiding her love for Battler deep within her so that she can move on.[/spoiler]

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Ushiromiya Rosa (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Rosa is Kinzou's fourth child. As the youngest of her siblings, she has the least influence at the family conference. Her husband abandoned her shortly before the birth of her daughter and only child, Maria. 

Rosa is the president of a small design company, "Anti-Rosa", which has begun to flounder, and thus seeks out Kinzou's inheritance to pay off her co-endorsers. 

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Ushiromiya Eba (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
[url=/c200]Kinzou's[/url] second child and eldest daughter. Eva is hostile towards her older brother [url=/c367]Krauss[/url] out of discontent for her family's patriarchal tradition, which places her in a position inferior to her brother in the family hierarchy, and constantly attempts to upstage him by all means. She rallies her younger siblings against Krauss to try and extort money out of him, though with limited success. She is skilled in various forms of martial arts, and is said to be excellent at cooking.

Despite her insidious personality, however, she treasures her husband and son dearly.

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Kumasawa Chiyo (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Kumasawa is a part-time worker who assists with domestic chores in [url=/c200]Kinzou's[/url] mansion. She often shirks her responsibilities and likes to tell stories and jokes, especially outrageous ones involving mackerel.  

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Ushiromiya Natsuhi (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Krauss' wife. Born into a family of Shinto priests, Natsuhi discarded her old life when she married into the Ushiromiya family. She is a very proud woman who holds her new family's name in high regard, and is in charge of managing the family head house and family conferences. However, her efforts are undervalued by her husband, and she is often afflicted with headaches. 

She holds a bitter rivalry with Eva, who mocks her for not being related to the Ushiromiya family by blood. She is also incredibly strict towards her daughter Jessica, but only out of concern that she becomes an ideal heiress to the Ushiromiya family.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Beatrice (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Beatrice is the Golden and Endless Witch, and the primary antagonist of the series for the first four games. She is affectionately referred to as "Beato" (ベアト) starting in Banquet of the Golden Witch.

A witch who has lived for over a thousand years, she is said to appear as a cloud of golden butterflies, and has the power to summon higher demons among the 72 pillars to serve her. It is said that humans can summon her to have their wishes granted in exchange for compensation, though she often acts whimsically. She is the one rumored to have given Kinzo ten tons of gold and served under him as the alchemic advisor to the Ushiromiya family.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

[spoiler]Her real identity is Yasuda Sayo, the child of [url=/c200]Ushiromiya Kinzou[/url] and grandchild of [url=/c15876]Beatrice Castiglioni[/url]. According to Sayo, her Beatrice identity was only fully created on November 29, 1984, when she discovered her true identity and inherited the 10 tons of gold belonging to her grandmother; she also has the alternate personas [url=/c202]Shannon[/url] and [url=/c205]Kanon[/url], with her alternative existence being [url=/c13719]Ushiromiya Lion[/url].

Due to [url=/c680]Natsuhi[/url] pushing the servant who was holding her from a cliff when she was a baby, she lost her sexual organ; however she got rescued by [url=/c276]Genji[/url] and [url=/c1341]Nanjou[/url], who hid her true identity, raising her as female and lowering her age by three years.

She is in love with [url=/c196]Ushiromiya Battler[/url], due to Shannon "transferring" her seed of love to her, yet she believes she is incapable of love due to her mutilated body.
[/spoiler]

name: Ushiromiya Kyrie (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Kyrie is Rudolf's second wife. She is also one of Rudolf's business partners, always assisting him in shady dealings and keeping him in line when he gets out of hand. Kyrie and Battler have bonded more as close friends with a sibling-like relationship rather than mother and son. She has a "flip the chessboard" mentality to work out mental problems, and influences Battler in this regard.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Bernkastel (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Bernkastel is a witch known as the Witch of Miracles, and greatly resembles [url=/c3790]Furude Rika[/url] from [url=/v67]Higurashi no Naku Koro ni[/url].
Her vast power is capable of creating all kinds of miracles, but her heart has broken a bit as a result.

Back when she was a human, [url=/c4103]Lambdadelta[/url] once imprisoned her with a cruel fate, toying with her the whole time. As a result, it seems she's unable to abandon others who are caught within a similar fate.

It is said she resides in a world where concepts such as fate and probability can be visualized. She comes to [url=/c1340]Beatrice's[/url] game to ease her boredom. She assists the player by giving some hints around the workings of the game. Her "Magic of Miracles" allows her to reset a desperate situation as long as the probability of a favorable situation is not equal to zero.

[Edited from [url=https://07th-expansion.fandom.com/wiki/Bernkastel]Bernkastel[/url] on 07th Expansion Wiki]

name: Lambdadelta (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
The Witch of Certainty, who has lived for a thousand years. She embodies the idea that "hard workers are rewarded" and is revered even by humans.

Though she is a witch, she does not stray far from the concepts of humans. For that reason, her power as one worshiped by humans is incalculable.

However, she is fickle about whose efforts she chooses to reward, and in many cases, she bestows her favor upon those who entertain her the most.

Her immense, swift, and terrifying power can make any witch surrender in an instant.

However, she is often reckless, and [url=/c3558]Bernkastel[/url] was able to take full advantage of that.

[From [url=https://07th-expansion.fandom.com/wiki/Lambdadelta]Lambdadelta[/url] on 07th Expansion Wiki]

name: Furfur (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Furfur is the thirty-fourth highest ranking earl of Hell and is Zepar's twin. Given the circumstances of the twins' gender, Furfur is suggested to be female since it is stated in the TIPS that Furfur is of the opposite gender of the ambiguously male Zepar. Furfur always appears in unison with Zepar when summoned, and has the power to cultivate emotions. Furfur can also grant an inexhaustible offensive power to those who contract them.

name: Ushiromiya Ange (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Ange is Rudolf and Kyrie's daughter, and Battler's sister. At 6-years-old she could not come to the island in 1986 due to a sickness.

After the events of Banquet of the Golden Witch, she is raised by her aunt Eva after she returns alive from Rokkenjima, and studies to become the next family head. However, she is put through many hardships, particularly due to Eva's belief that her son George should have been the next head, especially after Eva's genuine desire to raise Ange as though she were her own daughter is poisoned when Bernkastel manipulates a young Ange into rejecting Eva as a surrogate mother.

name: Furudo Erika (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Erika is a young detective introduced in End of the Golden Witch. A blue-haired girl estimated to be around the age of a middle school student, she is characterized as being highly intelligent and possessing an excellent memory. She acts very polite in public, and shows an extreme interest in puzzles and mysteries. In truth, she is ruthless and cunning, and only solves mysteries to boast her superiority towards those who execute them.

name: Ushiromiya Lion (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Lion is a member of the Ushiromiya family who exists only within the alternate world shown in Requiem of the Golden Witch as a result of Natsuhi deciding to keep the baby Kinzou offered her. As the first child of Krauss and Natsuhi in this world, Lion is the heir to the Ushiromiya family and well liked by the rest of the family, including Kinzou, in part because of Lion's softspoken nature and good-mannered upbringing. [spoiler]Lion is in fact Kinzou's biological child together with his daughter Beatrice.[/spoiler] Lion becomes Willard H. Wright's partner during his investigation of Beatrice's death, becoming close with him and even leading to a running gag in which Lion would pinch Will's buttocks whenever Will acts in a disrespectful manner.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Zepar (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Zepar is the 16th highest ranking earl of hell, named after the demon of the same name, and is Furfur's twin. Despite having the appearance of a girl with long, light-blue hair and a darkly colored dress, Zepar might be male since Furfur is said to be of a different gender. Zepar appears alongside Furfur when summoned by those who seek romance, and has the power to seduce humans. Zepar can also grant unlimited defensive power and even brief immortality to those who contract them.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Gaap (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Gaap is the 33rd highest ranking earl of hell named after the demon of the same name. She is a curly-haired woman who wears a red dress and a hat with a pink bow. Quite flamboyant, Gaap loves to tease people and gives people random nicknames by shortening their names ("Riiche" for Beatrice, "Lia" for Virgilia, etc.). She is one of Beatrice's friends, though she is greatly disliked by Virgilia. She draws power from the Abyss to summon holes that can lead anywhere, although there are limits.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Virgilia (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Virgilia was the previous Endless Witch before Beatrice, and was also her teacher. Her new name (having passed her old one to her student) comes from the Divine Comedy character Virgil, who guides Dante through Hell and Purgatory to Beatrice, who is his guide through Heaven. She is a silver-haired witch with great powers, despite surrendering most of them to Beatrice with the title of the "Endless Witch".

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: EVA-Beatrice (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Eva-Beatrice is a witch who resides within Eva's heart. She represents all of Eva's dark desires from her childhood, including her greed for the Ushiromiya family inheritance; as such, she has the appearance of Eva as a young girl. She first appears in Banquet of the Golden Witch, where she helps Eva solve the riddle of Beatrice's epitaph, leading to her discovery of Kinzou's hidden gold and her inheritance of the Ushiromiya family. As stipulated in the epitaph, Eva inherits the name "Beatrice" and is granted the titles of Golden and Endless Witch, with Lambdadelta as her guardian.

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Lucifer (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Representing the fallen angel Lucifer and the corresponding sin of pride, she is the eldest among all the Stakes of Purgatory and acts as their leader. She is extremely insecure, knowing herself to be the most inferior to her sisters, and fears what they would do if they found out. As such, she acts arrogant and conceited to keep her weaknesses from being discovered. Despite that, she takes pleasure in surrendering on her own accord. Lucifer's appearance is a girl with long, straight black hair.

name: Leviathan (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Representing the demon Leviathan and the corresponding sin of envy, she is the second eldest of the Stakes of Purgatory, and the self-fashioned representative of the younger sisters to Lucifer. By nature, she is a jealous, selfish crybaby who will do anything to win. Her otherwise brutal personality allows her to easily pinpoint the weaknesses of others. Unfortunately for her, she is clumsy at everything she does and always comes out last at everything she and her sisters do together. Leviathan's appearance is a girl with wavy, middle-length green hair.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Satan (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Representing the demon Satan and the corresponding sin of wrath, she is the third eldest of the Stakes of Purgatory. She is easily angered and speaks with scornful inflection, making her the most feared out of the sisters, including by the sisters themselves. Since people are too afraid to talk back at her, she often becomes lonely. She often tries to intentionally anger her sisters so they can be angry with her, but to no avail. Satan's appearance is a girl with short, curly pale hair.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]

name: Belphegor (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Representing the demon Belphegor and the corresponding sin of sloth, she is the middle child of the Stakes of Purgatory. She is hard-working and sensible, but only so that her master can become a lazy pig and fall all the harder. Her serious nature makes her the most trusted of her sisters, but she is not used to being treated with kindness. Belphegor's appearance is a girl with long dark hair in a ponytail.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Mammon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Representing the demon Mammon and the corresponding sin of greed, she is the third youngest of the Stakes of Purgatory. She is extremely greedy and, with her ability to act quickly, will do anything to get what she wants, often leading her to start conflicts between her sisters. Unlike the other Stakes, however, she is the most honest emotionally. Mammon's appearance is a girl with long brown hair. In Alliance of the Golden Witch, she is Ange's best friend.

name: Beelzebub (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Representing the demon Beelzebub and the corresponding sin of gluttony, she is the second youngest of the Stakes of Purgatory. She is a gourmet, and is willing to use even her own flesh if it is used to make a delicious meal. Due to her connection to food, she is widely known among other enthusiasts. She serves as a calming influence among the sisters. She has a competitive streak with Mammon to see who will get something first. Beelzebub's appearance is a girl with short, curly, blonde hair in two drill pony tails.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Asmodeus (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Representing the demon Asmodeus and the corresponding sin of lust, she is the youngest of the Stakes of Purgatory. She wants to fall in love, and is willing to sacrifice her life for the sake of it. Due to her young age, she is treated affectionately by everyone, but is not taken seriously among the sisters. This makes her wish all the harder for her knight in shining armor to arrive and help her be accepted as an adult, though such a thing is nothing more than a delusion. Asmodeus' appearance is a girl with long, blonde, straight hair in two pony tails.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Umineko_no_Naku_Koro_ni_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Dlanor A. Knox (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Dlanor is the Chief Inquisitor of Eiserne Jungfrau and enforces the commandments of Knox's Decalogue, originally written by Ronald A. Knox. Known as Archbishop Knox, Dlanor is popularly known as "Death Sentence Dlanor" and "Dlanor of the Ten Wedges." She can summon a red blade of light, which differs from the others seen in the series by having a handle.

name: Beatrice Castiglioni (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Beatrice "Bice" Castiglioni was [url=/c200]Ushiromiya Kinzou[/url]'s first and only true love and his "mistress", as said in many rumors. Introduced in 1944, Beatrice was the daughter of an Italian Social Republic naval official. Often called Bice (pronounced "Bee-che"), she accompanied her father to Rokkenjima on a submarine containing ten tons of gold, though her father died during the trip. Because Kinzou was the only person able to speak English, he and Beatrice became interpreters between the Japanese and Italian soldiers on the island.

name: Cornelia (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Cornelia is an aide in Eiserne Jungfrau, and a third-class priest. She has a strong sense of justice, but despite her cold exterior shared by her comrades, she is quite hot-blooded in nature. Cornelia is new to Eiserne Jungfrau and is innocent and unaware of the dark side of her profession. She was chosen for her current mission specifically by Gertrude. She was chosen so that she could decide if she was the right type of person for this profession.

name: Gertrude (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Gertrude is a senior aide in Eiserne Jungfrau, and a first-class priest. She wears a uniform similar to Cornelia's, and appears as a girl with red eyes and long blond hair. Like her comrades, she appears extremely deadpan when on duty, but is actually a very charitable character well-liked by her juniors.

name: Featherine Augustus Aurora (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Featherine Augustus Aurora is the witch form of Hachijou Tooya (Itouikukuro Zerogonanaroku), and the Witch of Theatergoing, Drama and Spectating, an Endless Witch, and also a Creator.

name: Hachijou Ikuko (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Hachijou Ikuko is the mystery novelist who fabricated stories about the Rokkenjima murders along with her partner Hachijou Tooya. [spoiler]She was the person who found Battler after he was passed out on a highway. She had taken him in and gave him the name Tooya.[/spoiler]

name: Ushiromiya Beatrice (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Ushiromiya Beatrice, also known as Kuwadorian-Beatrice, is the daughter of [url=/c200]Ushiromiya Kinzou[/url] and [url=/c15876]Beatrice Castiglioni[/url].

name: Clair Vaux Bernardus (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Was created by Bernkastel to narrate Requiem of the Golden Witch and serves as a vessel for Yasu. She is a reader similar to the role [url=/c13708]Ushiromiya Ange[/url] performed for [url=/c15879]Featherine Augustus Aurora[/url] during Dawn of the Golden Witch. She is a "substitute actor" without a personality that acts as a vessel to personify both Beatrice and the rules of her game, as Beatrice does not exist in the world presented by Bernkastel. Her name signifies that she is the final guide of Beatrice's game

name: Manon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Manon is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived at Rokkenjima when Yasu already became Shannon.

She was friend with Shannon and Jessica.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Manon]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Asune (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Asune is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived with Berune after Runon, Renon, Sanon and Benon left.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Asune]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Berune (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Berune is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived with Asune after Runon, Renon, Sanon and Benon left.

name: Benon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Benon is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She is one of Yasu's first coworkers along with Runon, Renon and Sanon.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Benon]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Renon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Renon is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived pretty early along with Runon, Sanon and Benon but they left afterwards.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Renon]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Runon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Runon is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived pretty early along with Renon, Sanon and Benon but they left afterwards.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Runon]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Sanon (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
Sanon is one of the orphans from the Fukuin House who worked in the Ushiromiya household. She arrived pretty early along with Runon, Renon and Benon but they left afterwards.

[From [url=http://umineko.wikia.com/wiki/Sanon]Umineko Wiki[/url]]

name: Chiester 410 (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Chiester 410 is a weapon in contract with Beatrice. 410 is a kid whose personality tends to cause her to speak arrogantly.

name: Chiester 45 (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Chiester 45 is a weapon in contract with Beatrice, 45 has a very methodical and timid personality, and her persecution complex is somewhat strong. This makes her compensate well for the weakness of 410's rough personality when they work as a pair. Since she cannot stand silence, she sometimes becomes emotionally insecure if she isn't always being ordered by someone. 45 has excellent capabilities in searching for the enemy and deciding orders. The sisters' battle power is multiplied by her support.

name: Chiester 00 (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about: Chiester 00 is a member of the Chiesters Sisters Imperial Guard Corps, which serves Pendragon, 00 has the position as their calm and composed leader. However, while that is the position demanded of her, she actually has a weaker composition. 00 excels in reconnaissance and as an advance guard, possessing extreme supremacy in encounters. However, her excess fighting power is criticized as being inhuman, and it is not rare for her to be lynched and abused when she surrenders on the battlefield. Her one eye silently tells of that.

name: Yasuda Sayo (VN)
series: Umineko no Naku Koro ni Chiru
about:
[spoiler]Yasuda Sayo is the true human identity of [url=/c202]Shannon[/url], [url=/c205]Kanon[/url], [url=/c1340]The Golden Witch, Beatrice[/url], and The Man From 19 Years Ago. Her "true name" is Ushiromiya Lion and she is both the child and grandchild of [url=/c200]Ushiromiya Kinzou[/url] due to him raping his daughter [url=/c16417]Ushiromiya Beatrice[/url]. After Beatrice II's death, Sayo was given to [url=/c680]Natsuhi[/url] by Kinzo to raise as her own. However, a few days after their adoption, Natsuhi had pushed a servant carrying them off a cliff, resulting in the death of the servant and severe laceration of Sayo's lower abdomen. The injury had resulted in Sayo's body being unable to produce the hormones necessary to develop secondary sex characteristics or make children.

After the incident, [url=/c276]Genji[/url], [url=/c366]Kumasawa[/url], and [url=/c1341]Nanjou[/url] had found the child and decided to keep their survival a secret from everyone due to fear of Kinzo repeating his mistake of raping his child. They lowered their age by three years and had them raised under the name Yasuda Sayo at the Fukuin House with the gifted name Shannon. When she was old enough, she was hired to work as a servant on Rokkenjima.[/spoiler]

Yasu's 'true appearance' and biological sex is never stated or shown within the visual novel.

name: Sumadera Kasumi (VN)
about: Sumadera Kasumi is the younger sister of [url=/c1342]Ushiromiya Kyrie[/url]. Since her sister married with Rudolf, she bore extreme resentment towards Kyrie, to the point of loathing everything about her sister, including [url=/c13708]Ushiromiya Ange[/url].

name: Chiester 556 (VN)
about: A weapon of the Sisters' Cavalry, which serves Pendragon. 556 was a quiet and teased character, but she was loved by everyone. However, her luck was always bad, and she met a tragic end in battle with the Black Witch. She was the latest style of weapon, and unique in the Sisters' Cavalry, which had a strong tint as an honor guard. 556 was in charge of squad fire support. She shot not to kill, but to protect her allies.

name: Saya (VN)
about:
A mysterious girl who appeared before Fuminori, sparking intrigue with her quest to find her missing father. In Fuminori's distorted perception, Saya is the only figure of normalcy and becomes a crucial source of mental support. As time passes, she gradually grows fond of Fuminori, reciprocating his deep affection and care towards her.

[spoiler]True to Fuminori's suspicion, Saya is not a human; she's an eldritch entity whose actual form is perceived as grotesque and horrifying to everyone except Fuminori. 

Her origins are ambiguous and subject to various interpretations throughout the story. The narrative suggests that she is not of this world, either literally or metaphorically. She has no memories of where she came from and is guided only by her instincts. Her relationship with Fuminori strongly influences her behavior, and she takes actions driven by her desire to be with him and understand his world.

Saya usually hides in the shadows and preys on creatures of all sizes, from cats to human beings, typically killing them by snapping their necks or disembowelment through some unknown means and then feasting on their internal organs. [/spoiler]

[Based on [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url] and in-game content]

name: Takahata Oumi (VN)
about:
Kouji's girlfriend and You's best friend. 

Oumi is really upset with Fuminori for giving You the cold shoulder after the accident. She's worried about how this is affecting You, who's clearly hurt by his standoffish behavior.

[Edited From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Tsukuba You (VN)
about:
Fuminori's club friend. 

Tsukuba had feelings for Fuminori and confessed to him through Kouji and Oumi's mediation. However, she is bewildered by Fuminori's gloomy change after the accident.

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Tanbo Ryouko (VN)
about:
A neurosurgeon at T University Hospital and Fuminori's attending physician. She suspects Fuminori is hiding something during his weekly routine check-ups even though he physically appears to have fully recovered.

It seems Ryouko had some connection with Ougai Masahiko.

[From [url=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%B2%99%E8%80%B6%E3%81%AE%E5%94%84]Wikipedia[/url] and official site]

name: Suzumi Hiromi (VN)
about: Yosuke's daughter.

name: Monika (VN)
about:
Monika is noted by the other characters to be smart, beautiful, confident and athletic. She is not as talkative as the other girls, but this is implied to not be through choice. She always has a calm, gentle expression and is portrayed as mature and hard-working. 

Monika had previously been a part of the Debate Club but left due to all the inner politics and drama, highlighting a desire for order, freedom of topics and friendliness. The Literature Club, which she founded after leaving the Debate Club, is very important to her. She aspires for it to be a place to showcase and grow everyone's passion for literature. Monika openly displays care and concern for her club mates, praising each member's writing style and even comparing them to famous authors and poets. 
[spoiler]Starting from Act 2, she shows a much more manipulative personality. It is revealed that Monika was self-aware all along and resented from being made into a minor role. She becomes infatuated with the player and urges them to spend more time with her. Monika begins trying to dispose of her club mates so the player is forced to choose her, after her attempts to make the other girls unlikable fail. Her desire and ambition lead her to become obsessive in this goal, highlighted by the fact that all of her poems are about the player or her epiphany. 
Despite Monika's upbeat attitude in the Literature Club, it becomes increasingly obvious that she is really sad and lonely, as a result of being aware that her whole world is just a simulation; a simulation in which she can't even achieve what is considered "happiness" (i.e. having her route completed). She fixates on the player so much because they're the only "real" thing in her life. It also does not help that, whenever someone quits the game, Monika is trapped in a hellish void of noise, lights, colors, and screams and despite not even being able to form coherent thoughts, she remembers all of it whenever the player turns on the game again. 

Later in the game, the player will be able to read Monika's Talk where she talks directly to the player, instead of the protagonist. It is shown that nothing about Monika's apparent kindness and politeness is an act, and she even offers the player some genuinely good advice from time to time.[/spoiler]

[From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Monika]DDLC Wiki[/url]]

name: Sayori (VN)
about:
Sayori is portrayed as a talkative person, being very cheerful and kind and the archetype of a Genki Girl. She is very clumsy and notorious for finding ways to accidentally hurt herself or to drop things. However, despite being airheaded, she is rather cunning, being able to trick others just to get food. She is usually the only character, other than the protagonist, capable of breaking up arguments, and she is described as being paramount to keeping a relaxing atmosphere in the Literature Club, which becomes even more apparent [spoiler]after her suicide.[/spoiler] [url=/c64502]Monika[/url] notes that while she may look like a good leader, Sayori is usually better when it comes to dealing with people. [spoiler]She tries her best to help everyone be happy and dislikes attention directed at her well-being because she feels unworthy of anything that others have to offer her.[/spoiler]

[spoiler]Sayori's depression makes her disorganized, and she often "cannot find a reason to get out of bed in the morning"; her room, which the protagonist regularly cleaned for her, is also noted to be untidy. The protagonist notes how there hasn't been much change in her, and the changes the protagonist notices in her later are due to [url=/c64502]Monika[/url]'s interference, amplifying her depression and suicidal tendencies. Sayori also doesn't seem to think highly of herself. Her relationship with the [url=/c64506]Protagonist[/url] and other people's happiness are her main coping mechanisms since she believes that if she makes everyone else happy, she will not have a reason whatsoever to be unhappy.[/spoiler]

[Edited From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Sayori]DDLC Wiki[/url]]

name: Yuri (VN)
about:
Yuri is mature, shy, and has trouble with social interactions. She normally thinks carefully about what she says, but she is easily flustered and will impulsively blurt things out due to nervousness then repeatedly apologize for her outbursts. 

Yuri prefers to write using complex language and layer meaning under metaphors that require detailed interpretation. Yuri's writing and reading preferences greatly contrast with Natsuki's, which can create tension between them.

name: Natsuki (VN)
about:
Natsuki is a brash, blunt, cranky, seemingly arrogant girl with a cute, softer interior as a result of insecurity, convincing [url=/c64502]Monika[/url] enough to class Natsuki as the embodiment of a tsundere. While she is impulsive and can speak without thinking, she truly cares about her friends and, even when she has obvious anger issues, doesn't enjoy fights or arguments with people. [spoiler]Over the course of the game, we see that she worries about [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url] and on one occasion, gives the [url=/c64506]Protagonist[/url] a note asking him to help [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url], fearing that if she spoke out then it would cause more arguments.[/spoiler] She is very stubborn and has a hard time expressing how she feels and what she wants. When repeatedly challenged, she often becomes awkward and tongue-tied, then aggressive, and then simply bursts into tears. 

Her cute interior also involves a love of manga and anime, particularly those in the slice-of-life genre, and baking. [spoiler]She has been known to store her manga collection in the Literature Club out of embarrassment, another reason is (hinted at) her father would be angry while the rest of the club obviously knows about her interest, she is still hesitant to talk about it.[/spoiler] Natsuki also likes cute things, like cupcakes with cat faces. She also likes poems with cuter, happier words, though her own poems are still about sad things, such as being persecuted for your hobbies. she believes that it's important to be able to express something deep with few words. Her simplistic writing style puts her at odds with [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url], who has a more extravagant style. 
Natsuki dislikes being called "cute," even when she acts as such or does cute things, and will deny any claims from others relating to this; nevertheless, she is much more comfortable exposing her sweet side once she knows people aren't going to tease her about it. she hates it if she isn't taken seriously, whether it's her writing, her hobbies, or just her overall demeanor. [spoiler]It is likely she learned to be ashamed of herself and her hobbies, because her classmates judge her and her implied abusive father, making her abrasive nature a coping mechanism. This is also implied in a secret poem, "Things I Like About Papa", which is most likely written by her. 

It is shown that she is a very lonely person who desperately craves affection. One example is during the third poetry-sharing session. If she has liked all your poems to date, she outright asks the protagonist if he thinks her poems are the best, which swiftly shifts to her begging him to say they are, even if he hates them. [/spoiler]

[Edited From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Natsuki]DDLC Wiki[/url]]
